hypothesis: Augmenting contrastive multimodal pretraining with explicit positive pairs formed from distinct low-energy conformers of the same molecule will produce embeddings that are jointly invariant to SO(3) rotations and internal conformational variation, increasing the multi-pose retrieval rate on the rotated benchmark to >75% and reducing QM9 HOMO MAE by >10% relative to the original SMILESDFT-CLIP model.
